vibe: High fashion magazine meets digital brutalism. Stark, monochrome, massive typography, delicate borders, aggressive asymmetry, and zero rounded corners.

hierarchy.h1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-light leading-none
hierarchy.h2: font-serif text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-light
hierarchy.overline: font-sans text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-zinc-500
hierarchy.quote: font-serif text-xl italic text-zinc-300 border-l border-zinc-700 pl-4

components.card: relative border border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0A] p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-500 ease-out rounded-none
components.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-white text-black px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-xs font-bold hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors rounded-none
components.button_secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center border border-white/20 text-white bg-transparent px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-xs font-bold hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white transition-all rounded-none
components.input_field: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 px-0 py-4 focus:outline-none focus:border-white focus:ring-0 text-white placeholder-zinc-600 font-sans transition-colors rounded-none
components.tabs_list: flex space-x-8 md:space-x-12 border-b border-white/10 w-full overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar
components.tab_active: border-b-2 border-white pb-4 text-white uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-medium
components.tab_inactive: pb-4 text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-medium transition-colors
components.image_container: bg-[#111] overflow-hidden relative border border-white/10 grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-700
components.tag: px-3 py-1.5 border border-white/20 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-300

motion.reveal: opacity-0 translate-y-4 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-700

icons.style: light, strokeWidth={1} for a delicate, premium look

hero_background_texture.description: Abstract dark silk texture for hero or ambient backgrounds.

stylist_model_1.description: High fashion model enveloped in red, use for Landing Page hero or Person Photo tab placeholder.

stylist_model_2.description: Moody portrait under blue lighting, use as alternate placeholder for user profile or skin tone analysis.

wardrobe_item_1.description: Minimalist clothes hanging. Use for Wardrobe/Saved Outfits empty state or placeholders.

wardrobe_item_2.description: Clothing racks in store. Use for Catalog Mode background.

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICTLY adhere to the Dark Swiss Brutalist/Editorial theme. Absolutely NO rounded corners anywhere (use rounded-none globally).
Override default Shadcn components heavily: Strip out their default borders, radii, and backgrounds. Ensure they match the minimalist 1px border-white/10 aesthetic.
Typography: Use Cormorant Garamond for ALL headings (H1, H2, H3) with tight tracking and light weight. Use Outfit for UI/body text, buttons, and overlines.
Navigation & Header: Must use backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 with a 1px border-white/10 bottom border. Do not let it blend into the content.
Forms & Inputs: Do not use standard Shadcn card inputs. Inputs should be minimalist, bottom-border only (`border-b border-white/20`), with transparent backgrounds.

Image Upload Component: Style it as an editorial 'drop zone'—a large rectangular area with a dashed or solid thin border, centered thin icon, and delicate typography. No thick dashes or standard gray boxes.
Skin Tone Palette: Display as stark geometric squares with 1px borders. Do not use soft drop shadows. Position them in a rigid grid.

Results View (Stylist Output): Instead of generic progress bars, use thin 1px lines (`h-px bg-white/20`) with a highlighted section (`bg-white`) for scores. Score breakdowns should look like technical data readouts (monospace or strict uppercase sans-serif).
Gemini Explanation: Display this in a chic, editorial blockquote style. Use the `quote` typography rule (Cormorant Garamond, italic, subtle left border).
Toggles: Instead of standard iOS-style pill toggles, use rigid rectangular switches or high-contrast button groups (e.g., [ YES / NO ] stark blocks).
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, upload areas) MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='upload-photo-btn'`).
Use `lucide-react` icons globally. Set `strokeWidth={1}` for an elegant, thin look.
Layout Strategy: Embrace asymmetry in marketing/landing sections. Use wide gaps (`gap-16`) and rigid 1px grid lines to separate content rather than cards with shadows.
